core_rule: Every user-changeable knob has a known home, a known scope, and a known reset path.
security_rule: Never read or write a raw secret in any ledger entry, audit log, or UI surface. The save flow is the only path to .env.

settings_inventory.companion: styles.css cache-buster bump if theme tokens change

settings_inventory.affects: connectors.js blocks all connector writes when on; proxy returns { demo_blocked: true }
settings_inventory.side_effect_rule: Demo mode is the safest send-blocker. Customer-facing automation should respect it before any send.

settings_inventory.exclusivity_rule: The three providers are mutually exclusive. Only the selected provider receives chat / test / generate prompts.

settings_inventory.default: active model — currently GPT-5.4 family per 2026-04-27 alignment pass
settings_inventory.affects: every /api/chat/* request when aiProvider=openai; preprocess/reflection passes inherit this
settings_inventory.side_effect: wrong model can silently change tone, latency, cost — verify after change

settings_inventory.default: project default; can also be set via PIECES_CHAT_LLM env var
settings_inventory.affects: /api/pieces/ask calls; Activity screen + Briefing ribbon completions
ChatRail prompt assembly (extra reasoning / structuring before send)

sub_fields.name: resultCount
sub_fields.affects: ChatRail browser use worker page-fetch volume

sub_fields.name: detail
sub_fields.affects: depth of fetched content per page

settings_inventory.scope_note: browser use is the background Playwright worker. open browser is the visible Chrome handoff and is NOT governed by these defaults.

settings_inventory.ui_surface: masked input rows on Settings page
settings_inventory.read_endpoint: GET /api/settings/mcp_credentials (returns masked status, never raw values)
settings_inventory.allowlist_note: Verify against current server.py allowlist before adding new keys. To add a new credential: 1) update server.py allowlist, 2) add UI editor row, 3) update CONNECTIONS.md, 4) update this ledger §3.8 + §4.1.
save_flow: Operator types token in masked input
server.py allowlist check (must be in approved set)
update in-memory env map (server picks up immediately, no restart)
append to CCAgentindex/_ledger/activity.jsonl with kind='settings_mcp_credentials_save', key name only (NEVER value)
settings_inventory.audit_rule: Every save / clear records the key name and timestamp to the activity ledger. The value is never logged.

settings_inventory.refresh: manual refresh button + auto-refresh on page load

settings_inventory.event: comeketoagent:language window event fires on flip

settings_inventory.action: wipes localStorage.secretary.tweaks (and possibly other secretary.* keys)
settings_inventory.affects: every page that reads tweaks (effectively all)
settings_inventory.rule: should require a confirm step (UI rule, not enforced server-side)

server_side_env.write_path_rule: /api/settings/mcp_credentials/save — never via direct file edit from the UI side. Direct .env edits by operator (in terminal) are allowed and orthogonal.
keys_per_connections_ledger: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_API_KEY_SID, TWILIO_API_KEY_SECRET, TWILIO_WHATSAPP_FROM (twilio — when surfaced)

runtime_only.purpose: MCP server status registry, browser-use sessions, current chat context
runtime_only.rule: Not persisted. Re-derived from /api/status (server) or window.Secretary* services (client) on each page load.

when_on: connectors.js send() returns { ok: true, note: 'demo_blocked', demo_blocked: true } for every outbound channel
Read paths still work — Boxes browse, Pieces sweeps, Close-API-read tests
Server-side proxy double-checks the demo flag — even if a UI bug bypassed the client check, the server refuses the write
use_cases: Debugging a delegation flow without hitting external services
demo_mode_behavior.anti_pattern: Running automated tests against production data with demo mode off. Demo mode should be the default during dev and unit-test runs.

provider_exclusivity.rule: Only the selected provider receives chat / test / generate prompts. The other two are dormant.

codex_cli.runtime: local codex exec with selected GPT model + read-only sandbox

provider_exclusivity.switching: Instant. No restart. Picker writes to tweaks.aiProvider; every chat send checks it; routes self-select.
provider_exclusivity.caveat: Picker writes to localStorage only. Browser swap or storage wipe resets to project default.

change_radius.rerenders: every screen with i18n strings (via comeketoagent:language event)
every page that calls connectors.js send() (delegations, grid ChatRail, intake, boxes)
ChatRail, Settings test buttons, every /api/chat/* consumer
next ChatRail browser use worker run
server in-memory env map (immediate); affected service surfaces become available / unavailable

update_triggers: new toggle / picker / credential editor added to SettingsScreen
new env var added to server allowlist (also update CONNECTIONS.md §5)
demo mode block-list expands or contracts
provider exclusivity rule changes (e.g., fourth provider)
localStorage key shape changes (also update ASSET_WIDGET_MAP.md §6.1)
rule_when_pure_ui_rerender: If the change is purely a UI re-render of an existing setting, update page_asset_sitemap.md §settings only — NOT this ledger.

operator_quick_reference.Switch AI provider: Settings page → provider picker (claude_code / openai / codex_cli)
operator_quick_reference.Add or rotate a connector key: Settings page → MCP credentials → masked input + save
operator_quick_reference.Edit .env directly: Operator's terminal — server picks up on next request via in-memory map (or restart for full reload)

related_ledgers.what_services_exist: CONNECTIONS.md (Settings is the UI-configurable surface over its services)

history.event: Phase 15 — initial creation. 13-section catalog of every user-changeable knob: theme, language, demo mode, intelligence provider (3-way exclusive), OpenAI model, Pieces model, prompt enhancement, browser-use defaults (4 sub-fields), MCP credential editor (allowlisted save/clear with audit), MCP server status registry (read-only), reset. 3 persistence layers (.env / localStorage / runtime) cataloged. Save/clear flow + audit rule + provider exclusivity rule + demo mode rule documented. Tier: global. Companion files: SETTINGS.json, VISUALS/settings_surface_map.mmd. Companion Communications entry: COMM-2026-04-29-012.
